---
title: "CV"
author:
  firstname: Emma
  lastname: "W. Marshall"
  address: "3303 Orchard Street Apt. A, Lincoln, NE 68503"
  position: "Ph.D. Candidate in Social and Cognitive Psychology"
  contacts:
    - icon: fa envelope
      text: emmarshall47@pm.me
      url: "mailto:emmarshall47@pm.me"
    - icon: fa phone
      text: "(571) 594-2853"
      url: "tel:+15715942853"
    - icon: fa globe
      text: emmawmarshall.com
      url: "https://www.emmawmarshall.com"
brand:
  typography:
    fonts:
      - family: Sora
        source: google
        weight: [100, 400, 700]
        style: [normal]
      - family: IBM Plex Sans
        source: google
        weight: [100, 400, 700]
        style: [normal, italic]
    base: IBM Plex Sans
  color:
    primary: "#d00000"
    #primary: "#ff6361"
    link: "#202b47"
  defaults:
    awesomecv-typst:
      font-header: Sora
format:
  awesomecv-typst: default
bibliography: cv-references.bib
csl: apa-cv.csl
highlight-author: "Marshall, E. W."
suppress-bibliography: true
execute: 
  echo: false
---
```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(typstcv)
library(tibble)
library(dplyr)
library(glue)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)

link <- function(text, url) {
  case_when(
    is.na(url) | url == "" ~ as.character(text),
    TRUE ~ as.character(glue('#link("{url}")[{text}]'))
  )
}
```

# Education
```{r}
#| label: education
#| output: asis

education <- tribble(
  ~title, ~location, ~date, ~institution, ~thesis_type, ~thesis_title, ~url,
  "Ph.D. in Social and Cognitive Psychology", "Lincoln, NE", "August 2026 (Expected)", "University of Nebraska-Lincoln", "Dissertation", "What to Suspect When They're Expecting: Abortion Ambiguity, Hindsight Bias, and Probable Cause Determinations in Pregnancy Loss Investigations After Dobbs", "",
  "Juris Doctorate", "Lincoln, NE", "May 2022", "University of Nebraska-Lincoln", "Concentration", "Constitutional Law", "",
  "M.A. in Social and Cognitive Psychology", "Lincoln, NE", "May 2022", "University of Nebraska-Lincoln", "Thesis", "Warrantless Searches, Hindsight Bias and Probable Cause", "",
  "B.A. in Psychology", "Claremont, CA", "May 2014", "Pomona College, With Distinction", "Senior Thesis", "I got 99 Friends but the Police ain't One: Facebook, Privacy, and the Fourth Amendment", "https://www.pomona.edu"
) |>
  mutate(
    institution_linked = link(institution, url),
    description = case_when(
      !is.na(thesis_type) & thesis_type != "" ~ glue("{institution_linked} #linebreak() *{thesis_type}:* {thesis_title}"),
      TRUE ~ institution_linked
    )
  )

education |>
  resume_entry(
    title = "title",
    location = "location",
    date = "date",
    description = "description"
  )
```

# Professional Experience
```{r}
#| label: professional-experience
#| output: asis

prof_exp <- tribble(
  ~title, ~location, ~date, ~organization, ~description, ~url,
  "Editorial Assistant, Court Review", "Lincoln, NE", "August 2022 - Present", "American Judges Association", "Manage manuscript workflow, perform copyediting, coordinate with authors and reviewers, and assist with publication layout for the quarterly journal serving the American judiciary", "https://www.americanjudgesassociation.org/court-review",
  "Graduate Research Assistant", "Lincoln, NE", "May 2019 - May 2023", "The Center for Children, Families, and the Law", "Developed and evaluated training curricula for DCFS Child Protection and Safety New Worker Training; created educational materials and assessments for child welfare professionals", "https://ccfl.unl.edu",
  "Graduate Research Assistant", "Lincoln, NE", "August 2016 - Present", "Law and Policy Lab, University of Nebraska-Lincoln", "Design and conduct experimental research on Fourth Amendment issues, consent searches, and privacy expectations; supermanage data collection and analysis; Principal Investigator: Eve M. Brank, JD/PhD", "https://lawpolicylab.unl.edu/",
  "Lab Manager", "Claremont, CA", "May 2014 - August 2016", "Legal Decision-Making Research Lab, Scripps College", "Supervised undergraduate research assistants, managed IRB protocols and lab operations, coordinated multi-site data collection, and maintained research databases; Principal Investigator: Jennifer Groscup, J.D./Ph.D.", "https://www.scrippscollege.edu",
  "Undergraduate Research Assistant", "Claremont, CA", "August 2012 - May 2014", "Legal Decision-Making Research Lab, Scripps College", "Conducted participant recruitment and data collection, performed behavioral coding, completed systematic literature reviews, and assisted with manuscript preparation; Principal Investigator: Jennifer Groscup, JD/PhD", ""
) |>
  mutate(
    org_linked = link(organization, url),
    description_full = glue("{org_linked} #linebreak() #v(3pt) #text(size: 0.9em, fill: luma(80))[{description}]")
  )

prof_exp |>
  resume_entry(
    title = "title",
    location = "location",
    date = "date",
    description = "description_full"
  )
```

```{=typst}
#pagebreak()
```

# Teaching Experience
```{r}
#| label: teaching
#| output: asis

teaching <- tribble(
  ~title, ~location, ~date, ~organization, ~course_num, ~students, ~format, ~website, ~syllabus,
  "Teaching Assistant, Research Methods and Data Analysis", "Lincoln, NE", "Fall 2023 - Spring 2026", "University of Nebraska-Lincoln", "PSYC 350", "20-30 students", "In-person", "", "",
  "Instructor, Introduction to Psychology", "Lincoln, NE", "Summer 2024", "University of Nebraska-Lincoln", "PSYC 181", "25-30 students", "Online", "", "",
  "Instructor, Psychology of Social Behavior", "Lincoln, NE", "Summer 2019", "University of Nebraska-Lincoln", "PSYC 288", "15-20 students", "In-person", "", "",
  "Co-Instructor, Law and Psychology", "Lincoln, NE", "Fall 2018", "University of Nebraska-Lincoln", "PSYC 463", "25-30 students", "In-person", "", "",
  "Instructor, Law and Psychology", "Lincoln, NE", "Summer 2018", "University of Nebraska-Lincoln", "PSYC 463", "15-20 students", "Online", "", "",
  "Teaching Assistant, Law and Psychology", "Lincoln, NE", "Spring 2018", "University of Nebraska-Lincoln", "PSYC 463", "25-30 students", "In-person", "", "",
  "Teaching Assistant, Senior Thesis in Psychology", "Claremont, CA", "Fall 2015 - Spring 2016", "Scripps College", "PSYC 190", "10-15 students", "In-person", "", ""
) |>
  mutate(
    icons = pmap_chr(list(website, syllabus), \(website, syllabus) {
      icons <- character(0)
      if (!is.na(website) && website != "") {
        icons <- c(icons, glue('#link("{website}")[#fa-icon("globe")]'))
      }
      if (!is.na(syllabus) && syllabus != "") {
        icons <- c(icons, glue('#link("{syllabus}")[#fa-icon("file-pdf")]'))
      }
      if (length(icons) == 0) return("")
      paste(icons, collapse = " ")
    }),
    title_with_icons = case_when(
      icons != "" ~ glue("{title} {icons}"),
      TRUE ~ title
    ),
    description = glue("{organization}, {course_num} #linebreak() {students}, {format}")
  )

teaching |>
  resume_entry(
    title = "title_with_icons",
    location = "location",
    date = "date",
    description = "description"
  )
```

# Selected Workshops and Guest Lectures
```{r}
#| label: workshops
#| output: asis

workshops <- tribble(
  ~title, ~location, ~date, ~course, ~authors, ~mentees, ~website, ~slides,
  "Guest Lecturer: A.I. and Legal Decision Making", "Lincoln, NE", "Fall 2024, Spring 2025", "Law and Psychology, UNL", "", "", "", "https://emmarshall.github.io/slides/talks/ai-guest-lecture-2025/#/title-slide",
  "Guest Lecturer: The Psychology and Law of Section 230", "Lincoln, NE", "Spring 2025", "Law and Psychology, UNL", "", "", "https://emmarshall.github.io/section230-psych/", "",
  "Workshop: Introduction to Jamovi", "Lincoln, NE", "Fall 2024, Fall 2025", "University of Nebraska-Lincoln", "", "", "https://emmarshall.github.io/jamovi-workshop-lab/", "",
  "Workshop: Using Zotero for Psychology and Law Research", "Lincoln, NE", "Fall 2024, Fall 2025", "University of Nebraska-Lincoln", "", "", "https://emmarshall.github.io/zotero-lab/", "",
  "Guest Lecturer: Judicial Decision-Making", "Lincoln, NE", "Spring 2023", "Law and Psychology, UNL", "", "", "", "https://emmarshall.github.io/slides/talks/judges-guest-lecture/#/title-slide",
  "Introduction to Expert Testimony: A Legal Workshop", "Denver, CO", "2022", "AP-LS Annual Meeting", "Fishel, S. and Marshall, E.", "", "http://www.apls-students.org/uploads/4/6/5/6/46564967/apls_2022_legal_primer_-_expert_witnesses.pdf", "http://www.apls-students.org/uploads/4/6/5/6/46564967/apls_2022_-_legal_seminar.pdf",
  "What is a Contract and Why Do I Care?: Exploring the Relationship between Psychology and Contract Law", "New Orleans, LA", "2020", "AP-LS Annual Meeting", "Wertheimer, J., Marshall, E., and Hazen, K.", "", "", "http://www.apls-students.org/uploads/4/6/5/6/46564967/contracts_workshop__apls_2020_.pdf",
  "Guest Lecturer: Psychology and the Law in the American Legal System", "Bogota, Colombia", "Fall 2022", "Santo Tomas University", "", "", "", "",
  "What is Free Speech and Will I Know It When I See It?", "Portland, OR", "2019", "AP-LS Annual Meeting", "Marshall, E., McCracken, E., Hazen, K.P., †Day, C., and †Danigole, E.", "yes", "", "http://www.apls-students.org/uploads/4/6/5/6/46564967/first_amendment_apls1.pdf",
  "Privacy and the Fourth Amendment", "Memphis, TN", "2018", "AP-LS Annual Meeting", "Marshall, E., Haby, J., and Hazen, K.P.", "", "http://www.apls-students.org/uploads/4/6/5/6/46564967/fourth_amendment_primer_.pdf", "http://www.apls-students.org/uploads/4/6/5/6/46564967/fourth_amendment_workshop.pdf",
  "Guest Lecturer: Psychology of Jury Decision-Making", "Lincoln, NE", "Summer 2018", "Advanced Social Psychology, UNL", "", "", "", ""
) |>
  mutate(
    authors_bold = authors |>
      str_replace("Marshall, E\\.,", "*Marshall, E.*,") |>
      str_replace("Marshall, E\\.$", "*Marshall, E.*") |>
      str_replace("Marshall, E\\. and", "*Marshall, E.* and") |>
      str_replace(", Marshall, E\\.", ", *Marshall, E.*") |>
      str_replace("^Marshall, E\\.", "*Marshall, E.*"),
    icons = pmap_chr(list(website, slides), \(website, slides) {
      icons <- character(0)
      if (!is.na(website) && website != "") {
        icons <- c(icons, glue('#link("{website}")[#fa-icon("globe")]'))
      }
      if (!is.na(slides) && slides != "") {
        icons <- c(icons, glue('#link("{slides}")[#fa-icon("file-powerpoint")]'))
      }
      if (length(icons) == 0) return("")
      paste(icons, collapse = " ")
    }),
    title_with_icons = case_when(
      icons != "" ~ glue("{title} {icons}"),
      TRUE ~ title
    ),
    has_mentees = mentees != "",
    has_authors = authors != "",
    description_full = case_when(
      has_authors & has_mentees ~ glue("{course} #linebreak() {authors_bold} #linebreak() _†Undergraduate mentee_"),
      has_authors ~ glue("{course} #linebreak() {authors_bold}"),
      TRUE ~ course
    )
  )

workshops |>
  resume_entry(
    title = "title_with_icons",
    location = "location",
    date = "date",
    description = "description_full"
  )
```

# Publications

::: {.apa-bib}
[@brank2022privacy]

[@marshall2019police]

[@brank2019sniffer]
:::

# Manuscripts in Preparation and Under Review
::: {.apa-bib}

[@hoetger2025bright]

[@hazen2025oneperson]

[@groscup2025objectively]

[@marshall2025igot99]

[@marshall2025workemail]

[@brank2025callme]
:::

# Presentations
::: {.apa-bib mentee-note="true"}

[@marshall2025suffrage_lsa]

[@marshall2025suffrage_apls]

[@marshall2024electoral]

[@marshall2024hindsight]

[@guzman2024archival]

[@mccracken2022reforming]

[@hazen2020trust]

[@hazen2020voice]

[@wilson2020socialsupport]

[@wilson2020socialsupport_unl]

[@hazen2019electoral]

[@buhr2019consent]

[@marshall2019innocence]

[@brank2018smartphone]

[@groscup2018talksweet]

[@brank2018touchme]

[@marshall2018postsnowden]

[@marshall2017k9]

[@mcgarry2017knocking]

[@marshall2016brightlights]

[@marshall2015facebook_apa]

[@marshall2015cloud]

[@marshall2015facebook_apls]

[@marshall2015experiences]

[@caldwell2015knowledge]

[@groscup2015nsa]

[@marshall2015smartphone]

[@gold2015race]

[@marshall2014workemail]

[@deo2014searchseizure]

:::

# Professional Service
```{r}
#| label: service
#| output: asis

service <- tribble(
  ~title, ~organization, ~location, ~date, ~url,
  "Student Member, Early Career Professionals Committee", "American Psychology-Law Society", "", "2023 - 2025", "https://www.apadivisions.org/division-41",
  "Past-Chair, Student Committee", "American Psychology-Law Society", "", "2021 - 2022", "https://www.apadivisions.org/division-41",
  "Chair, Online Poster Session", "American Psychology-Law Society", "", "2021", "",
  "Chair, Student Committee", "American Psychology-Law Society", "", "2020 - 2021", "https://www.apadivisions.org/division-41",
  "Chair-Elect, Student Committee", "American Psychology-Law Society", "", "2019 - 2020", "https://www.apadivisions.org/division-41",
  "Student Reviewer", "Law and Human Behavior", "", "2022 - 2025", "https://www.apa.org/pubs/journals/lhb",
  "Student Web Editor", "American Psychology-Law Society", "", "2019 - Present", "https://www.apadivisions.org/division-41",
  "Law-Psychology Representative", "UNL Graduate Student Assembly", "Lincoln, NE", "2018 - 2019", "",
  "Student Reviewer, Annual Meeting", "American Psychology-Law Society", "", "2018 - 2026", "",
  "Law Liaison, Student Committee", "American Psychology-Law Society", "", "2017 - 2019", "https://www.apadivisions.org/division-41",
  "Board Member", "Pomona College Alumni Association", "Claremont, CA", "2014 - 2017", "https://www.pomona.edu/alumni",
  "Senior Class President", "Associated Students of Pomona College", "Claremont, CA", "2013 - 2014", "",
  "President and Co-Founder", "Title IX Student Coalition, Pomona College", "Claremont, CA", "2013 - 2014", ""
) |>
  mutate(
    org_linked = link(organization, url)
  )

service |>
  resume_entry(
    title = "title",
    location = "location",
    date = "date",
    description = "org_linked"
  )
```

# Professional Memberships
```{r}
#| label: memberships
#| output: asis

memberships <- tribble(
  ~title, ~location, ~date, ~description, ~url,
  "Law & Society Association", "", "2024 - Present", "Student Member", "https://www.lawandsociety.org/",
  "Society for the Teaching of Psychology", "", "2024 - Present", "Student Member", "https://teachpsych.org/", 
  "American Psychology-Law Society", "", "2012 - Present", "Student Member", "https://www.ap-ls.org",
  "American Psychological Association", "", "2014 - Present", "Student Member", "https://www.apa.org"
) |>
  mutate(
    title = link(title, url)
  )

memberships |>
  resume_entry(
    title = "title",
    location = "location",
    date = "date",
    description = "description"
  )
```

# Professional Honors and Awards
```{r}
#| label: awards
#| output: asis

awards <- tribble(
  ~title, ~organization, ~location, ~date,
  "CALI Excellence for the Future Award, Family Law", "University of Nebraska College of Law", "Lincoln, NE", "2019",
  "CALI Excellence for the Future Award, Juvenile Law", "University of Nebraska College of Law", "Lincoln, NE", "2019",
  "CALI Excellence for the Future Award, Legal Profession", "University of Nebraska College of Law", "Lincoln, NE", "2019",
  "Conference Student Travel Award", "AP-LS, APA Division 41", "", "2015",
  "Distinction in the Senior Thesis Exercise", "Pomona College Psychology Department", "Claremont, CA", "2014",
  "Senior Service Award", "Pomona College", "Claremont, CA", "2014",
  "Student Travel Grant", "Pomona College Psychology Department", "Claremont, CA", "2014",
  "Pomona College Scholar", "Pomona College", "Claremont, CA", "2012 - 2014"
)

awards |>
  resume_entry(
    title = "title",
    location = "location",
    date = "date",
    description = "organization"
  )
```
